title: rhinorchis ernestii
intro: Rhinorchis ernestii, also known as Ernest's orchid or rock orchid, is a rare and endangered species of orchid found in New Zealand. It is traditionally used in Maori medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rhinorchis ernestii include its potential to treat skin conditions, wounds, and infections, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing. In traditional Maori medicine, Rhinorchis ernestii is often prepared as a tea or infused oil for its medicinal benefits.
